final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: PPT cover slide, presentation deck cover for Chinese domestic roadshow / fundraising pitch
Primary request: A polished Chinese-style VC roadshow PPT cover slide announcing the launch of GPT-5.5, with speaker credit for Sam Altman
Scene/backdrop: Clean dark navy or deep ink-blue gradient background with subtle Chinese-style geometric or circuit-pattern texture, suggesting technology and prestige
Subject: Bold headline announcement of "GPT-5.5 发布" as the central visual focus; speaker name "奥特曼" displayed prominently as presenter; OpenAI logo or GPT-5.5 wordmark as secondary element
Style/medium: Flat corporate slide design, Chinese domestic GP/VC pitch deck aesthetic — authoritative, data-forward, slightly patriotic-tech color palette, clean sans-serif typography
Composition/framing: Landscape slide layout (16:9), title centered or left-aligned in upper half, speaker info in lower-left, decorative accent lines or light rays emanating from center
Lighting/mood: Sleek, confident, forward-looking; subtle glow or gradient highlight on the headline text; serious and institutional tone matching Chinese LP/GP expectations
Color palette: Deep navy blue + electric blue accent + gold or champagne highlight + white text — classic Chinese roadshow prestige palette
Materials/textures: Smooth gradient background, thin geometric grid lines, subtle glowing circuit or data-flow motifs
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5 发布" "奥特曼" "演讲人：奥特曼"
Constraints: Must feel like a genuine Chinese domestic VC/GP roadshow deck cover; layout must be 16:9 landscape; text must be legible and prominent
Avoid: Cartoonish illustration style, overly Western minimalism, cluttered background, watermark
